mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 5% signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE < 5%, or the correlation between UNRATE and SPX returns falls below 0.25.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts indicates robust demand-side momentum, which drives corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between GDPC1 and HOUST shows a negative coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions, or SPX returns decline despite concurrent GDP and housing growth.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts above 1,000,000 units signals strong consumer confidence and construction activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where HOUST > 1070, or the predictive power of HOUST declines below 0.15 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in industrial production above 105 signals increased manufacturing activity that boosts corporate profits and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show negative correlation with INDPRO in 3-year rolling windows, or INDPRO fails to predict SPX returns with an IC > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in CPI inflation below 235 indicates stable price levels that allow central banks to maintain accommodative policies, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL < 235, or the predictive power of CPIAUCSL declines below 0.12 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in nonfarm payrolls above 140,000 signals strong employment growth that increases consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where PAYEMS > 140000, or the predictive power of PAYEMS declines below 0.10 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and retail sales indicates strong consumer demand that drives corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between GDPC1 and RSAFS shows a negative coefficient in 3-year rolling regressions, or SPX returns decline despite concurrent GDP and retail sales growth.
